report.summary: Steady-state cycle: no new deploys since Mar 25 batch deploy; 105 published slugs still missing page.tsx files; 145 TS errors in 6 files (non-blocking, isolated to examples + 5 learn pages); all 6 API routes structurally healthy with proper cache TTLs and fallbacks.

sections.title: QA Tester
items: Page Existence Audit: 577 published slugs, 472 have page.tsx (81.6%), 105 missing — mostly learn guides (28), wallets (19), taxes (15), investing/best (13), blog posts (9), compare/exchanges (1), defi-lending/reviews (1), trading (1)

TypeScript: 145 errors across 6 files — structured-data.examples.ts (syntax errors, non-blocking example file) + 5 learn guide pages (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield)
No new pages built or published this cycle — last commit was Mar 25 batch deploy (170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages)
No regressions detected since last cycle — codebase unchanged

sections.title: Data Engineer
items: All 6 public API routes present and structurally sound: prices (CoinGecko, 60s TTL), fear-greed (Alternative.me, 600s TTL), trending (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), market-metrics (CoinGecko+Alternative.me, 60s TTL), market-dominance (CoinGecko, 300s TTL), defi-yields (DefiLlama, 300s TTL)
Cache strategy: all routes use in-memory cache + Cache-Control headers with stale-while-revalidate — properly layered
Fallback handling: all routes have graceful degradation — stale cache served on API failure, static fallback data as last resort
No rate limit hits observable from code review — health endpoint has 100/min rate limit, others rely on upstream CoinGecko free-tier limits
Note: health endpoint uses mock service checks (random-based) rather than real upstream pings — acceptable for current stage

sections.title: DevOps
items: Latest commit: 21aaf5b (Mar 25) — batch deploy of 170+ pages, 18 guides, 5 ecosystem pages, OG images, UX fixes
No new commits today (Mar 28) — production should match last deploy
Cannot verify live Vercel deployment status (egress blocked to degen0x.com from this environment)
No error spikes detectable from codebase review — no new code changes since last successful deploy
Build health: TS errors exist but are isolated to non-critical files (examples + 5 learn pages) — production build likely unaffected if these files are excluded or ts-nocheck'd

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Shipped this cycle: No new code shipped — steady state since Mar 25 batch deploy
Carry-over: 105 published slugs without page.tsx need to be either built or removed from published-pages.ts to avoid 404s on indexed URLs
Carry-over: 145 TS errors in 6 files should be resolved before next deploy
Carry-over: 5 learn guide pages with TS errors need fixes (crypto-arbitrage, crypto-index-funds, institutional-crypto-adoption, lido-v3-stvaults, rwa-yield-vs-defi-yield)
No blockers requiring Jefe's immediate attention — platform is stable
